title: Replace stale Python checks in merge-conflict guardrail
description: Update `templates/agents/merge-conflict.md` to remove stale Python-specific quick-check commands and point agents to run the project test suite using shared-memory lookup or project-root detection aligned with the test-execution skill.
acceptance_criteria: `templates/agents/merge-conflict.md` contains no reference to `codex_orchestrator`, `py_compile`, or `uv run python`.
The guardrail tells agents to search memory for the test command and fall back to project-root detection when needed.
The merge-conflict guidance is consistent with the command-selection flow defined in `capability/test-execution`.
